case_scope: Canonical concentric-tube double-pipe heat exchanger with both fluids in co-current arrangement, single-phase liquid on both sides (no phase change), fixed geometry (no iterative sizing), heat balance closure at design point. Upstream paths exercised: TASK-007 (tube + annulus single-phase correlations) + TASK-006 (heat balance solver) + TASK-008 (fixed-geometry double-pipe rating). Pressure drop is explicitly NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ scope; excluded from TASK-019 by frozen design §6).
amendment_basis: TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08 (PR branch codex/task-019-freeze-validation-vectors). Freezes the canonical case input vectors, the canonical expected output vectors for the TASK-006/007/008-authorized fields, and the per-field tolerance values for case 01. Pressure-drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ excluded). No production calculation was executed to derive these frozen values; all numeric vectors are engineering-literature-referenced canonical baselines (Kern, Process Heat Transfer, 1950 — water-water 1"/2" tube-in-shell reference) and are auditable via provenance_metadata.json. Tolerance values are derived from the deterministic numerical behavior of the TASK-006/007/008 frozen upstream contracts and the CoolProp property provider's documented numerical accuracy at the operating envelope (see _tolerance_metadata.json per-field basis notes).

geometry.shell_material_id: SS304 (stainless steel 304, per TASK-017 approved material catalog)
geometry.tube_material_id: SS304 (stainless steel 304, per TASK-017 approved material catalog)

amendment_1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 fixture-shape reproducibility was preserved (case_scope / case_title / schema_version / tolerance_profile_id / provenance_profile_id / license_boundary_attestation / pressure_drop_excluded_from_taska_019). All TBD-by-Slice-2 input and expected_output placeholders were replaced with frozen canonical numeric vectors per the TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08. Pressure drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. No TASK-020+ field was introduced.
